name: Ramesses
bio:
Ancient Pharaoh transformed into a Mummy, pursuing the secret of immortality. He fights for justice with dark curses and Taunt powers.

Role: Revival Protection
Specialty: A front-midline Defense-type hero that can apply group Corrosion for continuous damage; has certain Taunt and self-healing abilities, and can automatically revive when defeated.

skillSlots.name: Vengeful Spirit Storm
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 highest Crit enemy targets for 230% M.DMG with 40% probability to apply [Taunt].

effects.name: Cycle Rebirth
effects.description: Upon death, gains [Rebirth] and recovers 20% + 5% * [Infect] stacks on enemies as Max HP (triggers once per battle max).
